title: Mytaranor Slaving Council
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Mytaranor_Slaving_Council.png|thumb|right|350px|Mytaranor Slaving Council leaders]]
{{Quote|Of all the individuals and groups in this ''[sic]'' reports, it is this group I would most like to see brought to justice.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]|<ref name="air">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>}}
The '''Mytaranor Slaving Council''' was a [[Slavery/Legends|slaving]] group operating in the [[Mytaranor sector/Legends|Mytaranor sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="air" />

The Slaving Council sold slaves to important [[Mining/Legends|mining]] companies wanting to extract resources on [[Mytaranor]]. It became famous because of its affordable prices and its excellent catalog.<ref name="air" />

The mobile headquarters of the council was the [[Prison ship/Legends|dungeon]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] [[Vanquisher (Kiltirin-class)|''Vanquisher'']]. At any given moment, the jail included an average of 800 prisoners, plus 200 slavers and/or guards, with most of them in the ''Vanquisher''.<ref name="air" />

The Slaving Council noticed that able-bodied [[Species/Legends|species]] such as [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]], [[Gigoran/Legends|Gigorans]] and [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] received higher prices, so they resorted to using [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] to capture them. The Council also dealt in [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]], [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamaris]] and [[Quarren/Legends|Quarrens]]. This led to them clashing with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], as the Alliance not only included Wookiees and other enslaved species among its files, but was also opposed to slavery.<ref name="air" /> At one point, the council was brought to almost extinction when it clashed with [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Alexander Julstan IV|Julstan]]'s [[Sector fleet/Legends|Sector Fleet]]. Only the intervention of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Lonay]] saved them.<ref name="SOTESB">''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref>

Rebel agent and Wookiee [[Tirranna]] wrote an extensive report on the Slaving Council, including descriptive information on her personal objection towards slavers and her hope of someday having a chance to kill each of them with her bare hands. Other Rebel officers such as [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] and [[Commander/Legends|commander]] [[Derembus Sitnalta]] also wrote reports on the council, but they were unable to keep a neutral point of view.<ref name="air" />

The Mytaranor Slaving Council might have been responsible for the capture of [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] [[Yurdak Fav]].<ref name="air" />
